title: A Dashboard that has links to other Dashboards?
excerpt: Is it possible to have a Dashboard that has widgets that just direct to a different dashboard? Almost like a Dashboard Directory but without it being just a list of links, something a bit more visual?

posts.author: JPope (Jackie Pope)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to have a Dashboard that has widgets that just direct to a different dashboard? Almost like a Dashboard Directory but without it being just a list of links, something a bit more visual?

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml: @JPope You could create a board where each item is a link or could be more detailed information for all dashboards, then display this board within a separate dashboard dedicated just to it.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
You could have a table board like a directory and include a file column with a snippet of the dashboard and display them as a card view like this:
